task: Bottom console visual unification, lens ruler alignment, and bottom action lowering

visual_unification.active_item_style: Seller Camera teal accent fill, stroke, and subtle glow
visual_unification.non_active_item_style: Transparent item background with no heavy cell border

validation.notes: Build passed with the existing nested xcodeproj warning. True-device screenshot and gesture validation remains required.

risks: Lens zoom ruler is visually aligned but remains a lens-specific lightweight component rather than the exact five-parameter renderer.
Bottom lowering is conservative and should be validated against real safe-area spacing.
No true-device screenshot or pinch-zoom validation was performed in this package.
next_recommended_package: Independent Focus focusing system UI preflight without returning Focus to the bottom five-parameter bar.
